headline: Shutdown SMASHES Longest Record 😩💥 TSA CHAOS LINES TO MOON 🌙✈️
text:
US GOV SHUTDOWN 🏛️🚫 just DROPPED the MIC 🎤💣 as 44-DAY DHS FUMBLE 🏈😵‍💫 CRUSHES previous record from Nov 2025 📅🔥 – longest EVER bby ‼️ Congress SIMPS 🤡💸 bickering over HOMELAND SECURITY 💪🛡️ while AIRPORTS turn into APOCALYPSE ZOMBIE LINES 🧟‍♂️✈️ SNAKING AROUND BUILDINGS 🏢🐍 VIRAL AF on TikTok 📱😂! TSA AGENTS 😷🚨 GHOSTING HARD 👻 – NO PAYCHECKS 💸🚫 means 500+ QUITTING 🍑💥 and 3,560+ CALLING SICK FRIDAY 😷📈 (12.35% workforce MIA 🤏😩) – lines SO THICC 🍆 they WRAPPING BUILDINGS like bad Amazon deliveries 📦😤!

White House BORDER CZAR Tom Homan 🛡️👨‍💼 spilling TEA ☕ on CBS Face the Nation: Trump 🍊🛩️ signed EXEC ORDER ✍️🚀 to PAY TSA DUDES early next week 💰📅 – 'We'll HOOK 'EM UP as long as NEEDED' 😤 but CONGRESS gotta PASS THE BILL 📜💨 or LEGAL DRAMA incoming ⚖️🚫 cuz Constitution says NOPE to Prez spending solo 🦅📖! Trump on Air Force One 🛩️👑 tells reporters: 'PAY TSA FOREVER if we must ⏳💸' but ROASTS Dems 🤡🔵 for SHUTDOWN SABOTAGE 😡 – 'ICE IS VITAL DADDY 🧊🇺🇸!' Homan vows ICE GOONS 🧊🚔 STAYING at airports 'TIL 100% SECURE 🛡️✅ – 'Helping TSA BROS like AVENGERS assemble 🦸‍♂️✈️!'

But NO END IN SIGHT 😵 Congress on 2-WEEK VACAY 🏖️🚫 dipped without DEAL 🤝❌! Senate passed COMPROMISE 👐 to FUND DHS PARTS and FIX LINES ✈️📉 but HOUSE GOP REJECTED 🍑🚫 – voted FULL FUNDING instead 💰🔥! Senate Dems like 'NO DICE ICE ❄️🚫 without MASK BANS 😷🚫 and NO RACIAL PROFILING 👮‍♂️🙅‍♂️!' GOP claps back: 'GIMME IMMIGRATION ENFORCEMENT 🧊🔒 and VOTER ID 🆔📋 or GTFO!' Trump BASHES: Dems CAUSING this MESS 😤🤡 – ICE keeps America SAFE from INVADERS 👽🚫!

TSA LIMBO 😩 – agents QUITTING or SICKING OUT 💀 leading to WORLD CUP PANIC 🏆⚽ June co-host vibes RUINED by ENDLESS QUEUES 🐌😱 – social media VIDEOS of TRAVELLERS SN AKED like PYTHONS 🐍🏢 going MEGAVIRAL 🔥📱! DHS encompassing TSA 😷, ICE 🧊, IMMIGRATION 🚫👤 and DISASTER SQUAD 🌪️🆘 – all STARVED 💸🚫 while lawmakers PLAY CHICKEN 🐔💥. Trump urging 'PASS THE BILL 📜🚀' but if NO IMMIGRATION JUICE 🧊💰? 'HELL NOPE 😡!' Shutdown ORGY of DELAYS 💦😩 – airports FEELING the BURN 🔥✈️ as Homan's ICE CREAM TEAM 🧊🍦 stays THICC till FIXED! 😂🍑
